messages.apps.confirmation.pii.desc:
Creative Cloud desktop applications help accelerate your productivity with seamless integration between Creative Cloud mobile apps and all of your creative assets — so you can work wherever you want.

You have the option to share information with Adobe about how you use these applications. This option is turned on by default and the information will be associated with your Adobe ID. This will allow us to provide you with a more personalized experience, as well as help us improve product quality and features. You can change your preference any time on your Adobe Account Management page.

messages.apps.cc.download.signInText: To view all of your apps,
messages.apps.cc.download.features.heading: Easily manage your Creative Cloud apps and services
messages.apps.cc.download.features.desc: Download apps, share files, find fonts and Adobe Stock assets, set preferences, and more — all from the Creative Cloud desktop app. It installs automatically when you install your first Creative Cloud app.
messages.apps.cc.download.features.desc.new: Download and install apps, share files, find fonts and Adobe Stock assets, set preferences, and more — all from the Creative Cloud desktop app. It installs automatically when you install your first Creative Cloud app.
messages.apps.cc.download.features.install.desc: Find, install, update, and launch all the right apps for your interests and projects in one place.
messages.apps.cc.download.features.discover.desc: Start with tutorials, get inspired, and connect with creatives like you from the Creative Cloud community.
messages.apps.cc.download.features.assets.heading: Collaborate and keep track of your work
messages.apps.cc.download.features.assets.desc: Organize and share your work with libraries and cloud documents.
messages.apps.cc.download.features.marketplace.de: Find and download libraries, fonts, and plugins to improve your creative workflows.

messages.apps.trailhead.mobile.heading: Install {appName}
messages.apps.trailhead.mobile.bodyText: You can't install this app on a mobile device. But if you'd like to install this app on your desktop, we'll email you a link.
messages.apps.category.updates.wam.fail.heading: Couldn’t load updates
messages.apps.category.updates.wam.fail.descripti: Updates aren’t loading on the web right now. Try again later or open the desktop app and go to Updates there.

messages.email.template.desktop.subject: Your Adobe {appName} installation link
messages.email.template.desktop.message: We received your request for a link to download {appName}. Please follow these steps to get your app:
messages.email.template.desktop.step1: Open this email on the laptop or desktop computer where you'd like to install {appName}.
messages.email.template.desktop.step2: Hit the Get your app button below to download the installer.

messages.email.template.nujmobile.subject: Your Adobe {planName} plan download link
messages.email.template.nujmobile.message: Welcome to your {planName} plan. Please follow these steps to get the apps in the plan:
messages.email.template.nujmobile.step1: Open this email on the laptop or desktop computer where you'd like to install the apps.
messages.email.template.nujmobile.step2: Hit the Get started button to begin.
messages.email.template.nujmobile.endText: We hope you enjoy your plan.
